  "findings": [
    "Lockout/tagout device applied incorrectly: lock without tag or tag without lock observed on energy isolating device."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work immediately.",
    "Apply both a compliant lock and a completed tag to each energy isolating device before any servicing or maintenance continues."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires that both lockout and tagout devices be used together when a system is isolatable, or if a tagout system is used, it must provide full employee protection. Having a lock without a tag (or vice versa) violates standard safety sequence and identification requirements, creating a critical safety hazard for personnel.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(6)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)"
  ]
}
